title: Field Trip to the Zoo: A Very Long Animal Roll Call

sentences.en: Wednesday. Our class took a field trip to the zoo today, and by the end, my legs were more tired than my brain, which is rare.
sentences.zh: 星期三。我們班今天去動物園校外教學，到最後我的腿比我的腦子還累，這種情況很少見。

sentences.en: The first exhibit was the giraffe enclosure, and honestly, nothing prepares you for how impossibly tall a giraffe actually is up close.
sentences.zh: 第一個展區是長頸鹿區，老實說，沒有任何事能讓你做好心理準備，近看長頸鹿到底有多不可思議地高。

sentences.en: Right next to the giraffes stood a zebra, and William spent five full minutes arguing that its stripes were "clearly hand-painted."
sentences.zh: 長頸鹿旁邊站著一隻斑馬，William 花了整整五分鐘爭論牠的條紋「明顯是手畫上去的」。

sentences.en: We moved on to the hippopotamus pool, where a massive hippo stayed almost completely underwater except for its eyes and nose.
sentences.zh: 我們接著走到河馬池，一隻巨大的河馬幾乎整個泡在水裡，只露出眼睛和鼻子。

sentences.en: A panda in the next section was doing absolutely nothing except eating, which several of my classmates found deeply relatable.
sentences.zh: 下一區的貓熊什麼都沒做，就只是一直在吃，我好幾個同學都覺得這種狀態非常有共鳴。

sentences.en: Near the panda area, a camel stood perfectly still, looking unbothered by the crowd of loud, excited students pointing cameras at it.
sentences.zh: 貓熊區附近，一隻駱駝一動也不動地站著，完全不受一群大聲又興奮、拿著相機猛拍的學生打擾。

sentences.en: The wolf enclosure was quieter than I expected; most of the wolves were resting in the shade instead of howling dramatically like in movies.
sentences.zh: 狼群區比我預期的還安靜；大部分的狼都躲在樹蔭下休息，不像電影裡那樣戲劇性地嚎叫。

sentences.en: A fox darted quickly across its enclosure, and William insisted it looked exactly like Perry, minus the ability to fetch a stick.
sentences.zh: 一隻狐狸快速地穿過牠的圍欄，William 堅持說牠看起來跟 Perry 一模一樣，只是不會撿樹枝而已。

sentences.en: In the small mammal house, a fat, sleepy hippo statue at the entrance turned out to be fake, which disappointed at least three kids in our group.
sentences.zh: 在小型哺乳動物館，入口那隻胖胖、看起來很想睡的河馬雕像其實是假的，讓我們這組至少三個小孩失望不已。

sentences.en: We watched keepers feed a goat and a rooster in the small farm area, where William tried to convince a staff member to let him hold a nut for the goat.
sentences.zh: 我們看飼育員在小農場區餵一隻山羊和一隻公雞，William 試圖說服一位工作人員讓他拿一顆堅果餵山羊。

sentences.en: A quiet pond nearby held a few geese and doves, and one very determined goose chased a boy from another class all the way to the gift shop.
sentences.zh: 附近一個安靜的池塘裡有幾隻鵝和鴿子，其中一隻非常有毅力的鵝，一路把另一班一個男生追到了紀念品店。

sentences.en: Near the aviary, an eagle sat completely still on a high branch, watching everyone below like it was personally judging our behavior.
sentences.zh: 在鳥舍附近，一隻老鷹一動也不動地棲在高高的樹枝上，俯視著下面的每個人，好像在親自評判我們的行為。

sentences.en: A crow nearby stole a piece of bread right out of someone's hand, which Bernice called "the most impressive crime I have ever witnessed."
sentences.zh: 旁邊一隻烏鴉直接從某人手裡叼走了一片麵包，Bernice 說這是「我這輩子見過最厲害的犯罪行為」。

sentences.en: The aquarium building held both a shark tank and a much bigger tank for a slow-moving whale model that turned out to just be an educational display.
sentences.zh: 水族館裡有一個鯊魚缸，還有一個更大的缸，裡面是一隻慢慢移動的鯨魚模型，結果只是一個教育展示品。

sentences.en: A turtle in the reptile section moved so slowly across its rock that William swore it had not moved at all in the ten minutes we watched it.
sentences.zh: 爬蟲區的一隻烏龜在牠的岩石上爬得超慢，William 發誓我們看的那十分鐘裡牠根本沒動過。

sentences.en: One older keeper, cleaning near the ape enclosure, told us the apes in his care were smarter than most of the students on this trip, which stung a little.
sentences.zh: 一位年紀較大的飼育員，在猿類區附近打掃時，跟我們說他照顧的猿類比這趟校外教學裡大部分學生都還聰明，這話有點刺耳。

sentences.en: By the end of the day, we had seen a giraffe, a zebra, a hippo, a panda, a camel, wolves, a fox, a goat, a rooster, geese, doves, an eagle, a crow, sharks, a whale display, a turtle, and apes, all before lunch.
sentences.zh: 到了一天結束，我們在午餐前就已經看完了長頸鹿、斑馬、河馬、貓熊、駱駝、狼群、狐狸、山羊、公雞、鵝、鴿子、老鷹、烏鴉、鯊魚、鯨魚展示、烏龜，還有猿類。

sentences.en: Lesson of the day: a zoo trip is basically a very long roll call of animals, and somehow William still wanted to see "one more thing" at every single exhibit.
sentences.zh: 今日心得：動物園校外教學基本上就是一場超級冗長的動物點名，而 William 不知怎麼地，在每一個展區都還想再多看「一個東西」。

quiz.question: What does William claim about the zebra's stripes?
options: That every zebra has different stripes.

quiz.question: What does the crow do near the aviary?
options: Steals a piece of bread out of someone's hand.
Chases a student to the gift shop.

quiz.question: What does the keeper near the ape enclosure say about the apes?
options: They are smarter than most of the students on the trip.
They are the newest animals at the zoo.
They eat more than any other animal there.
They are the zoo's most dangerous animals.
